creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Sorry for not reacting to this patch earlier.  It seems it 
not longer works though: 
===>  Building for dnsperf-2.0.0.0 
cc -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -pthread -DPACKAGE_NAME="" -DPACKAGE_TARNAME="" -DPACKAGE_VERSION="" -DPACKAGE_STRING="" -DPACKAGE_BUGREPORT="" -DHAVE_SA_LEN=1 -DHAVE_PTHREAD=1 -D_THREAD_SAFE -pthread -c dnsperf.c 
In file included from dnsperf.c:56: 
/usr/local/include/isc/file.h:28:22: error: isc/stat.h: No such file or directory 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /work/a/ports/dns/dnsperf/work/dnsperf-src-2.0.0.0-1. 
*** Error code 1 

Also, with this patch, the port still depends on bind97 which is no longer 
supported by ISC.  I'm going to remove this port and the bind97 port 
today, but if you can update this port to work with bind98 or bind99, 
I'd be very happy to reinstate it.
